AI Engineering

Accelerating AI: across all layers

Here, we are looking at how to map abstract model architectures onto physical hardware in the most efficient, scalable, and reliable way possible.

Implementing AI systems

Systolic Arrays
Matrix Multiplication
Distributed AI Systems
Compiler Optimizations
Kernal and OS Optimisations
Memory Systems
GPUs
Hardware Acceleration

By the end of this study, the objective is to be able to look at any model architecture paper and immediately conceptualize its implementation footprint.
